title: CobblePots
description: CobblePots bridges Cobblemon and BotanyPots, allowing you to farm Apricorns and Berries directly inside BotanyPots planters.
body:
### Turn your BotanyPots into a Cobblemon farm With CobblePots!

Apricorns and Berries can finally be grown in BotanyPots just like any other crop. Whether you re automating Apricorn production for Poké Balls or cultivating a colorful berry garden, CobblePots makes it simple, aesthetic, and fully integrated into your world. 

## ✨ Features 
🌱 Apricorn farming 
Plant Apricorn Seeds in BotanyPots to grow Apricorns. 

🍓 Berry farming 
Farm dozens of Cobblemon berries.

🪴 Mint farming
Farm all the Cobblemon Mints!

🪴 Multiple soils supported Works with dirt, farmland, coarse dirt, rooted dirt, podzol, 
mycelium, moss block, mud, gravel, sand, and red sand. 

🌸 Berry display! 
All berry bush models now render properly using BotanyPots growth stages. 

🔄 Balanced growth 
Uses BotanyPots grow times and yield scaling for consistent gameplay. 

✅ Lightweight and safe 
Recipes only load if both Cobblemon and BotanyPots are installed.

Disclaimer: This does not farm Apricorn Wood. If needed, I will add it, but atm its only the Apricorns / Berries.

***For safety reason, client and server are required to have this mod installed***
***You may use this mod on server, as long credit is provided***
